changeSet.author: Benjamin Mwalimu
changeSet.comment: Adding the column "adjustment_reason" to the table cashier_bill

changeSet.author: Benjamin Mwalimu
changeSet.comment: Adding the column "location_id" to the table cashier_cash_point

changeSet.author: marios
changeSet.comment: Adding new View item Privilege
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO role_privilege (role, privilege) SELECT role, 'View Inventory Items' FROM role_privilege WHERE privilege = 'View Cashier Items'
changeSet.comment: Adding new Manage item Privilege
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO role_privilege (role, privilege) SELECT role, 'Manage Inventory Items' FROM role_privilege WHERE privilege = 'Manage Cashier Items'
changeSet.comment: Adding new Purge item Privilege
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO role_privilege (role, privilege) SELECT role, 'Purge Inventory Items' FROM role_privilege WHERE privilege = 'Purge Cashier Items'
changeSet.comment: Deleting obsolete Cashier Item Role_Privilege Mappings
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM role_privilege WHERE privilege = 'View Cashier Items'
DELETE FROM role_privilege WHERE privilege = 'Manage Cashier Items'
DELETE FROM role_privilege WHERE privilege = 'Purge Cashier Items'
changeSet.comment: Deleting obsolete Cashier Item Privileges
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM privilege WHERE privilege = 'View Cashier Items'
DELETE FROM privilege WHERE privilege = 'Manage Cashier Items'
DELETE FROM privilege WHERE privilege = 'Purge Cashier Items'

changeSet.author: marios

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM privilege WHERE privilege = 'Refund Money'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO role_privilege (role, privilege) SELECT role, 'Refund Money' FROM role_privilege WHERE privilege = 'Give Refund'
DELETE FROM role_privilege WHERE privilege = 'Give Refund'
DELETE FROM privilege WHERE privilege = 'Give Refund'

changeSet.author: aderkey
changeSet.comment: Changing enums to varchar instead of int
cashier_bill.status
changeSet.sql: UPDATE cashier_bill SET _status = 'PENDING' where status = 0
UPDATE cashier_bill SET _status = 'POSTED' where status = 1
UPDATE cashier_bill SET _status = 'PAID' where status = 2
UPDATE cashier_bill SET _status = 'CANCELLED' where status = 3
UPDATE cashier_bill SET _status = 'ADJUSTED' where status = 4
changeSet.comment: cashier_seq_receipt_number_generator.sequence_type
changeSet.sql: UPDATE cashier_seq_receipt_number_generator SET _sequence_type = 'COUNTER' where sequence_type = 0
UPDATE cashier_seq_receipt_number_generator SET _sequence_type = 'DATE_COUNTER' where sequence_type = 1
UPDATE cashier_seq_receipt_number_generator SET _sequence_type = 'DATE_TIME_COUNTER' where sequence_type = 2
changeSet.comment: cashier_seq_receipt_number_generator.grouping_type
changeSet.sql: UPDATE cashier_seq_receipt_number_generator SET _grouping_type = 'NONE' where grouping_type = 0
UPDATE cashier_seq_receipt_number_generator SET _grouping_type = 'CASHIER' where grouping_type = 1
UPDATE cashier_seq_receipt_number_generator SET _grouping_type = 'CASH_POINT' where grouping_type = 2
UPDATE cashier_seq_receipt_number_generator SET _grouping_type = 'CASHIER_AND_CASH_POINT' where grouping_type = 3

changeSet.author: Aojwang
changeSet.comment: Adding the column status to the table cashier_bill_line_item

changeSet.author: jecihjoy
changeSet.comment: Adding the column service_id to the table cashier_bill_line_item

changeSet.author: jecihjoy
changeSet.comment: Add concept_id column in billable services

changeSet.author: jecihjoy
changeSet.comment: Adding the column order_id to the table cashier_bill_line_item

changeSet.author: Wikum Weerakutti
changeSet.comment: Migrate global properties from 'cashier.*' prefix to 'billing.*'

changeSet.author: Wikum Weerakutti
changeSet.comment: Create tables for billing exemptions and exemption rules

changeSet.author: Nethmi Rodrigo
changeSet.comment: Add cashier (provider) for each payment to track which cashier processed the payment

changeSet.author: Wikum Weerakutti
changeSet.comment: Create table for bill discounts with full audit trail

changeSet.author: Wikum Weerakutti
changeSet.comment: Create table for bill refunds with full audit trail

changeSet.author: Wikum Weerakutti
changeSet.comment: Widen cashier_bill.status to fit refund-derived enum values (PARTIALLY_REFUNDED is 18 chars)

changeSet.author: sihsalus
changeSet.comment: Ensure H2 static billing schema has metadata columns expected by Hibernate mappings.

changeSet.author: sihsalus
changeSet.comment: Create billing privileges normally loaded from config.xml by the OMOD runtime.
